interactions.buttonHover: ink-spread-watercolor-bleed — CSS radial gradient expands from center behind text, accent color intensifies
interactions.buttonClick: ink-splash-ripple — JS-created ripple element emanates from click point with ink gradient dissolution
interactions.cardHover: edge-soften-content-sharpen — card border fades to softer glow, text color sharpens via CSS transition
interactions.pageTransition: cinematic-ink-wash — Three-layer CSS transform overlay sweeps left-to-right with staggered timing
interactions.scrollReveal: ink-puddle-materialize — Elements fade in and rise from translateY with staggered delays per element index
interactions.navItemHover: ink-underline-draw — CSS ::after pseudo-element width animates from 0 to full from left origin
interactions.navItemActive: full-ink-wash-background — Linear gradient background with accent opacity behind nav text
interactions.inputFocus: liquid-border-flow — Border-color transition with expanding box-shadow glow ring animation
interactions.toggleSwitch: mercury-blob-slide — CSS spring-eased translateX on ::before pseudo with color transition on track
interactions.tooltips: not implemented (kept minimal for editorial aesthetic)
interactions.loadingState: ink-drop-pulse — Three dots with staggered scale/opacity keyframe animation
interactions.idleAmbient: ink-particle-drift — Canvas-based floating particles with dual accent colors and life cycle
interactions.microFeedback: ink-glow-flash — Brief box-shadow pulse with accent color on successful actions

views.label: Dashboard
contentElements: Editorial spread header with two-column greeting and pullquote
4 stat cards with ink-line top accent and trend indicators
5-item activity feed with monospace timestamps
4 quick action buttons with ink ripple
3-item deadline sidebar with accent dates

views.label: Projects
contentElements: Search toolbar with liquid-focus input and Create New button
6 project cards in 3-column grid with status dots
Each card has title, description, tech stack tags, and collaborator counts

views.label: Workspace
contentElements: Sidebar navigation with 6 section links and active state
Metadata table with 5 rows (status, created, modified, stack, collaborators)
5-item goal list with completion state indicators
Full project description editorial paragraph

views.label: Kanban
contentElements: 4-column kanban board (Backlog: 3, In Progress: 2, Review: 2, Done: 3)
10 total kanban cards with title, description, priority badge, and category tag
Column headers with card count badges
Done cards with reduced opacity

views.label: Whiteboard
contentElements: Toolbar with 6 tool buttons (select, container, connection, text, zoom in/out)
5 draggable containers with titles and notes
4 SVG ink-blur filtered connection paths
Animated dashed stroke lines

views.label: Schema Planner
contentElements: 5 entity nodes (User, Project, KanbanCard, Idea, Whiteboard)
Each entity has PK/FK markers and typed field lists
6 SVG dashed relationship lines with ink-blur filter
5 relationship label annotations

views.label: Directory Tree
contentElements: Two-column editorial layout with tree and preview
16 tree items across 4 depth levels with folder/file icons
File sizes displayed in monospace
Code preview panel with syntax-highlighted TypeScript schema

views.label: Ideas
contentElements: Idea capture form with title, description, tags, and priority select
5 idea cards with title, description, priority badge, tags, and date
Full Save Idea button with ink ripple

views.label: AI Chat
contentElements: 6 chat messages (3 AI, 3 user) in alternating layout
AI avatar with accent gradient
4 tool action cards (add_idea, 2x update_kanban, generate_tree)
Code block with generated directory tree
Chat input with send button

views.label: Settings
contentElements: 5 settings tabs (Account, Subscription, Preferences, Integrations, Data)
Account: name, email, avatar upload, bio textarea
Subscription: Pro Plan card with price, 5 features, renewal date
Preferences: 4 toggle switches, 1 select dropdown
Integrations: 4 service rows with connected/disconnected status
Data: Export, Import, and Delete Account sections

files.name: index.html
files.description: Complete SPA with all 10 views using data-view/data-page attributes, fullscreen overlay nav, ink wash transition overlay, ambient canvas

files.name: style.css
files.description: CSS custom properties, editorial typography, fullscreen nav styling, ink-wash transition layers, parallax support, responsive breakpoints at 1200/768/390px

files.name: app.js
files.description: Vanilla JS: hash routing, hamburger toggle, ink-wash page transitions, scroll reveal with stagger, ink ripple clicks, parallax, settings tabs, canvas ambient particles

files.name: validation/inspiration-crossreference.json
files.description: Inspiration sources and differentiation from previous passes

differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass1-blob-morph: No blob shapes, no organic border-radius morphing, no bento grid. Uses sharp editorial columns with traditional card layouts.
differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass2-wave-current: No wave/ocean metaphor, no horizontal stream bar, no SVG wave dividers. Uses fullscreen overlay menu and editorial column flow.
differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass3-mercury-metallic: No chrome reflections, no command palette modal, no metallic sheens. Uses soft ink-flow gradients and serif editorial typography.
differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass4-watercolor-wash: No light theme, no accordion sidebar, no pastel palette. Uses dark editorial layout with Cormorant Garamond heading font.
differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass5-neon-plasma: No neon colors, no tab bar navigation, no DJ/music metaphor. Uses magazine-spread layout with hidden hamburger navigation.
differentiationFromPreviousPasses.pass6-ink-calligraphy: No left rail navigation, no engraved items, no calligraphy letter metaphor. Uses fullscreen overlay nav with editorial magazine spreads and editorial columns.
